creator: lysfjord.daniel@smokepit.net
text:
(In reply to Marko Cupać from comment #8)

Try a poudriere bulk -C devel/rubygem-oj devel/rubygem-oj-introspect (specify jail as needed). My devel/rubygem-oj compile at version 3.13.23_2 contains the required .h-files. Try to find your last build log of devel/rubygem-oj and upload that here.
